sources.url: https://www.isrdfb.com/blog (3 blog posts: digitaltransformation, changemanage, humancapital)
sources.type: blog posts authored by CEO (analytical content)
workshop/lecture pages on company website (methodology + bio)

sources.url: https://digitalrosh.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Yoman-Masa-Book-IDF.pdf (full book; PDF 403 to fetcher; user provided text)
sources.type: selected methodological excerpts from authored book 'יומן מסע אל הטרנספורמציה הדיגיטלית' (2020). Author's introduction + 8 transformation characteristics + 5 information hypotheses + 3 research-question approaches + retrospective. Fictional narrative chapters excluded to avoid overload and avoid biasing engine toward fictional military context.

research_notes.purpose: Compare engine output (synthesis) against Erez's prior 3-document manual synthesis on the same subject. The user has a separate checklist of expected themes that will be sent AFTER extraction runs (to avoid biasing the engine).
research_notes.subject_relationship: Nicolas Bandurek is Erez's mentor. 3 strategic documents already exist (Erez-authored, validated operationally — they power an active bot writing in Nicolas's voice). Those documents are deliberately NOT in the bundle.
research_notes.icp_note: Nicolas is consultancy, not B2B SaaS Growth-Stage. ICP fit is NOT the test. Test is whether engine on public raw data converges with Erez's manual synthesis.

corpus_summary.first_party_sources: all (website pages, blog posts, LinkedIn, book excerpts)
corpus_summary.implication: Bundle is first-party-only. Self-articulation bias is high (CEO describes himself in his own terms; engine reflects rather than discovers). Documented in research_notes.

book_handling_decision.full_book_size: ~30,000 Hebrew words across 12 fictional diary chapters covering 2026-2040 in IDF
book_handling_decision.extracted: Author's introduction + methodological excerpts (8 transformation characteristics, 5 information hypotheses, 3 research-question approaches) + retrospective. Total ~2,500 words.
book_handling_decision.excluded: Narrative chapters (fictional content set in IDF military future; would bias engine toward fictional military context, not Nicolas's actual business positioning).
book_handling_decision.rationale: User original direction: 'הקדמה, פרק מתודולוגי, סיכום. שאר הספר overload.' The book has no single methodological chapter — methodology is distributed across the diary. Selected the highest-density methodological passages.
